overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, beginning at a street corner with holographic advertisements, passing through a convenience store and pedestrian plaza with a ripperdoc clinic, and ending inside the Cirrus Cola bar. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring futuristic architecture, cyan and pink neon lighting, and sparse pedestrian activity.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, dominated by a large holographic billboard and towering glass skyscrapers. The camera crosses the street and enters a pedestrian corridor between two distinctive buildings featuring prominent cyan neon archways, with palm trees visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a compact convenience store with glowing cyan neon trim, passing vending machines and a store counter where a clerk stands. After a brief moment inside, the camera exits back to the pedestrian street.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open pedestrian plaza with concrete benches and scattered pedestrians, the camera passes a food stall and approaches a ripperdoc clinic with distinctive outdoor medical chairs. A large digital billboard for 'NALAR' dominates the left side of the walkway.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by cyan neon strips running along the walls and ground. Large colorful mural advertisements line the left wall while palm trees stand in planters along the path.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Cirrus Cola bar, transitioning from the covered walkway to a dimly lit interior with red and blue neon signage. The scene ends at the bar counter where a bartender serves a seated customer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a towering neon intersection through a series of urban corridors and into a dimly lit bar. It begins at a futuristic city intersection dominated by holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers, moving across the street and through cyan neon archways toward distant palm trees. As the camera glides forward, it briefly enters a compact convenience store with glowing trim before emerging back into an open pedestrian plaza filled with concrete benches, food stalls, and a ripperdoc clinic. The scene then shifts into a covered walkway where cyan neon strips and colorful mural advertisements line the path, guiding the camera past planters of palm trees. Finally, the movement transitions from the bright outdoor lighting into the moody interior of the Cirrus Cola bar, ending at a counter illuminated by red and blue neon signage.
